content_body: Benton Falls, located in the stunning Cherokee National Forest of nearby Tennessee, is a breathtaking natural wonder that attracts hikers with its serene beauty and tranquil ambiance. This picturesque waterfall cascades down 65 feet, creating a mesmerizing display of water that contrasts beautifully with the lush greenery surrounding it. Accessible via a moderate 3-mile round trip hike along the Benton Falls Trail, the journey to the falls offers hikers a chance to immerse themselves in the diverse forest.
title: Benton Falls
